item.title: DevSecOps 最佳实践 | DevSecOps best practices
item.description:
马肯德兰

发表于请在下面找到 DevSecOps 最佳实践。

  • 左移方法
  • 安全教育
  • 文化
  • 可追溯性、可审计性、可见性

现在让我们深入了解一下。

左移方法

  • 这鼓励软件开发人员在 DevOps 流程中将安全性从右向左转移。
  • 在 DevSecOps 环境中， security从一开始就是开发过程中不可或缺的一部分。
  • 使用 DevSecOps 的组织邀请cyber security architects和工程师加入其开发团队。
  • 您的工作是确保堆栈中的所有组件和配置项都经过patched, securely configured, and documented 。
  • 向左移动可以让 DevSecOps 团队及早识别安全风险和vulnerabilities ，并立即响应这些安全威胁。
  • 开发团队不仅要考虑高效地开发产品，还要security during development 。

安全教育

  • 安全性是engineering and compliance的结合。
  • 组织需要在开发工程师、运营团队和合规团队之间partnerships关系，以确保组织中的每个人都了解组织的安全结构并遵循相同的标准。
  • 任何参与部署过程的人都应该熟悉应用程序安全的基本原则、 Top 10 Open Web Application Security Projects (OWASP)、应用程序安全测试和其他安全工程实践。
  • 开发人员需要了解threading models 、合规性检查，并对风险以及如何衡量风险和实施安全控制有一定的了解。

文化

沟通、人员、流程和技术

  • 在 DevSecOps，沟通流程安全和产品所有权的责任非常重要。
  • 只有这样，开发人员和工程师才能成为流程所有者并为他们的工作拥有所有权。
  • 通过允许团队创建适合他们需求的工作环境，团队成为对项目结果感兴趣的利益相关者。

可追溯性、可审计性、可见性

在 DevSecOps 流程中实施可追溯性、可审计性和可见性可以带来更深入的洞察力和更安全的环境。

可追溯性允许您在整个开发周期中跟踪配置项，直至您的代码中实现需求的位置。

它可以在您组织的control framework中发挥重要作用，因为它可以帮助您实现合规性、减少错误、确保应用程序开发中的代码安全并支持代码可维护性。

可审计性对于确保遵守安全控制非常重要。

技术、程序和管理安全控制必须是可审计的、有据可查的，并得到所有团队成员的遵守。

可见性通常是一种很好的管理技术，但它在 DevSecOps 环境中非常重要。

这意味着组织拥有一个强大的监控系统来测量operational heartbeats, send alerts, raise awareness ，并在整个项目生命周期内负责。

感谢您阅读我的文章直到结束。 我希望你今天意识到一些独特的事情。 如果您喜欢这篇文章，请分享给您的朋友，如果您有建议或想法与我分享，请在评论框中写下。

以上博客作为“Devtron Blogathon 2022”的一部分提交 - https://devtron.ai/
查看 Devtron 的 GitHub 存储库 - https://github.com/devtron-labs/devtron/并打个 ⭐ 来表达你的爱和支持。
在 LinkedIn 上关注 Devtron - https://www.linkedin.com/company/devtron-labs/和 Twitter - https://twitter.com/DevtronL/ ，让自己了解最新情况

一旦解除暂停，makendrang 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦未发布，makendrang 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 makendrang 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。



原文:

MakendranG

Posted on Jul 9

DevSecOps needs to naturally integrate security controls into the development, deployment, and operational processes. Kindly find below mentioned are the DevSecOps best practices.

  • Shift Left Approach
  • Security education
  • Culture
  • Traceability, auditability, visibility

Let us deep dive in detail now.

Shift Left Approach

  • "Shift Left" is the DevSecOps mantra. This encourages software developers to shift security from right to left in the DevOps process.
  • In the DevSecOps environment, security is an integral part of the development process from the beginning.
  • Organizations using DevSecOps invite cyber security architects and engineers as part of their development team.
  • Your job is to ensure that all components and configuration items in the stack are patched, securely configured, and documented.
  • Shifting to the left allows the DevSecOps team to identify security risks and vulnerabilities early and respond immediately to these security threats.
  • The development team not only thinks about developing the product efficiently, but also implements security during development.

Security education

  • Security is a combination of engineering and compliance.
  • Organizations need to form partnerships between development engineers, operations teams, and compliance teams to ensure that everyone in the organization understands the organization's security structure and follows the same standards.
  • Anyone involved in the deployment process should be familiar with the basic principles of application security, the Top 10 Open Web Application Security Projects (OWASP), application security testing, and other security engineering practices.
  • Developers need to understand threading models, compliance checks, and have a working knowledge of risks and how risks are measured and security controls are implemented.

Culture

Communication, People, Processes and technologies

  • Good leadership fosters a good culture that drives change within an organization.
  • At DevSecOps, it is important and essential to communicate responsibility for process security and product ownership.
  • Only then can developers and engineers become process owners and take ownership for their work.
  • The DevSecOps operations team needs to build a system that works for them, using technologies and protocols that are appropriate for the team and the project at hand.
  • By allowing the team to create a work environment that suits their needs, the team becomes a stakeholder interested in the outcome of the project.

Traceability, auditability, visibility

Implementing traceability, auditability, and visibility into your DevSecOps process leads to deeper insights and a safer environment.

Traceability allows you to track configuration items throughout the development cycle to where the requirements are implemented in your code.

It can play an important role in your organization's control framework as it helps you achieve compliance, reduce errors, ensure secure code in application development, and support code maintainability.

Auditability is important to ensure compliance with security controls.

Technical, procedural, and administrative security controls must be auditable, well documented, and adhered to by all team members.

Visibility is generally a good management technique, but it is very important in a DevSecOps environment.

This means organizations have a robust monitoring system to measure operational heartbeats, send alerts, raise awareness when changes or cyberattacks occur, and be accountable throughout the project lifecycle.

Gratitude for perusing my article till end. I hope you realized something unique today. If you enjoyed this article then please share to your buddies and if you have suggestions or thoughts to share with me then please write in the comment box.

item.title: TypeScript 可选参数 | TypeScript Optional Parameters
item.description:
在 Javascript 中，如果一个函数有 4 个参数，而我们只使用 3 个参数，这没什么大不了的 - Javascript 只是忽略缺少的参数并像undefined一样运行函数。

在 TypeScript 中，情况有些不同。 如果您尝试使用与函数实际具有的参数数量不同的参数运行函数，则会收到错误消息。 例如，考虑一下：

 const myFunction = ( a : string , b : string , c ?: string ) => { return a + " " + b + " " + c ; } let runFunction = myFunction ( " Hello " , " there " );

上面的代码会抛出以下错误：

 Expected 3 arguments, but got 2.

因此，我们需要明确告诉 TypeScript，我们在函数上定义的一个或多个参数是可选的。 为了做到这一点，我们使用? 在参数之后，表示它实际上是一个可选参数。

例如，如果我们想在我们的原始函数上使c成为可选，我们可以编写以下内容 - 而不会出现错误：

 const myFunction = ( a : string , b : string , c ?: string ) => { return a + " " + b + " " + c ; } let runFunction = myFunction ( " Hello " , " there " ); console . log ( runFunction );

现在我们的函数将按预期运行，但是输出将是Hello there undefined 。 这可能不是您想要的行为，这正是 TypeScript 拥有这些控件的原因 - 它可以通过要求某些参数来帮助防止不需要的结果。

然而，在 TypeScript 中，可选参数后面不能跟必填参数。 因此，例如，以下代码将不起作用：

 const myFunction = ( a : string , b ?: string , c : string ) => { return a + " " + b + " " + c ; }

它将产生以下错误：

 A required parameter cannot follow an optional parameter.

我们可以将此可选性与typeof 运算符的使用结合起来，以生成有意义的代码。 例如，如果c是可选的且未定义，那么我们可以忽略它，如下所示：

 const myFunction = ( a : string , b : string , c ?: string ) => { if ( typeof c === undefined ) { return a + " " + b ; } return a + " " + b + " " + c ; } let runFunction = myFunction ( " Hello " , " there " ); console . log ( runFunction );

现在我们的代码输出将是Hello there ，但我们也可以使用c运行它以产生不同的输出，例如：

 const myFunction = ( a : string , b : string , c ?: string ) => { if ( typeof c === undefined ) { return a + " " + b ; } return a + " " + b + " " + c ; } let runFunction = myFunction ( " How " , " are " , " you? " ); // Returns "How are you?" console . log ( runFunction );

穆罕默德·米尔法特米—— 阿舍尔巴德·帕尼格拉希 - 一旦暂停，smpnjn 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，smpnjn 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，smpnjn 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 smpnjn 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。



原文:

In Javascript, if a function has 4 parameters, and we only use 3, it's no big deal - Javascript just ignores the missing parameter and runs the function as if it is undefined.

In TypeScript, things are a little different. If you try to run a function with a different number of parameters than the function actually has, you'll get an error. For example, consider this:

const myFunction = (a: string, b: string, c?: string) => { return a + " " + b + " " + c;
} let runFunction = myFunction("Hello", "there");

The above code will throw the following error:

Expected 3 arguments, but got 2.

TypeScript does this to ensure fewer errors, since leaving a parameter out of a function you are calling can sometimes break the function. As such, we need to tell TypeScript specifically that one or more of the parameters we defined on the function are optional. In order to do that, we use a ? after the parameter, to denote that it is actually an optional parameter.

For example, if we wanted to make c optional on our original function, we could write the following - and not get an error:

const myFunction = (a: string, b: string, c?: string) => { return a + " " + b + " " + c;
} let runFunction = myFunction("Hello", "there"); console.log(runFunction);

Now our function will run as expected, however the output will be Hello there undefined. This may not be your desired behaviour, which is exactly why TypeScript has these controls in place - it can help prevent unwanted outcomes by requiring certain parameters.

In TypeScript, however, an optional parameter cannot be followed by a required one. So for example, the following code will not work:

const myFunction = (a: string, b?: string, c: string) => { return a + " " + b + " " + c;
}

It will produce the following error:

A required parameter cannot follow an optional parameter.

We can combine this optionality with the use of the typeof operator to produce code that makes sense. For example, if c is optional and undefined, then we can ignore it, like so:

const myFunction = (a: string, b: string, c?: string) => { if(typeof c === undefined) { return a + " " + b; } return a + " " + b + " " + c;
} let runFunction = myFunction("Hello", "there"); console.log(runFunction);

Now the output of our code will be Hello there, but we could also run it with c to produce a different output, for example:

const myFunction = (a: string, b: string, c?: string) => { if(typeof c === undefined) { return a + " " + b; } return a + " " + b + " " + c;
} let runFunction = myFunction("How", "are", "you?"); // Returns "How are you?"
console.log(runFunction);

Mohammad Mirfatemi - Jul 3

Ashirbad Panigrahi - Jul 7

item.title: 为什么没有 128 位 CPU？ | Why are there no 128-bit CPUs?
item.description:
正义中心

发表于为什么这种进化似乎已经停止了？ 这些位代表什么？ 未来会有128位处理器吗？

什么是比特？

用最简单的术语来说，位是计算中信息的基本单位。 它们可以打开或关闭，它们构成了从单个字母到整个网站的所有内容。 如今，大多数数字设备都使用二进制代码，这是一系列代表开启和关闭状态的 1 和 0。 因此，当您在网上看到“1”或“0”时，这有点实际。

计算机使用大量这些小家伙来做各种各样的事情——比如存储数据、运行程序或通过互联网进行通信。 而且因为有很多不同的方法可以将它们串在一起（或不串起来），这意味着可以有几乎无限数量的组合来创建新的单词、图片和想法。 因此，下次您在线看到一些很酷（或奇怪）的东西时，请记住它是一次创建的！

为什么市场上没有 128 位处理器？

最明显的原因是更宽总线宽度的好处将被制造这种芯片的成本和复杂性增加所抵消。 此外，市场上对此类产品没有真正的需求； 最后，即使需要 128 位 CPU，当前的软件也无法利用它们的功能。

最后，我想提醒您，今天有超过 64 位的解决方案，但它们不是经典的 CPU，而是执行特定活动和处理特定数据集的专用组件。 此外，还有一些逻辑解决方案允许您通过利用现代架构创建多位虚拟系统来处理 128 位或更高的数据。 这证实了真正需要超过 64 位的物理芯片来应对现代技术挑战。

历久弥新—— 一旦暂停，justice_hub 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，justice_hub 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，justice_hub 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果justice_hub 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。



原文:

Justice-hub

Posted on Jul 9

Why does it seem like this evolution has stopped there? What do these bits represent? Will there be 128-bit processors in the future?

What are bits?

In the simplest terms, bits are the basic unit of information in computing. They can be either on or off, and they're what make up everything from individual letters to entire websites. Most digital devices these days use binary code, which is a series of ones and zeroes that represent those on and off states. So when you see a "1" or "0" online, that's a bit in action.

Computers use large amounts of these little guys to do all sorts of things - like store data, run programs, or communicate over the internet. And because there are so many different ways to string them together (or not), that means there can be an almost infinite number of combinations for creating new words, pictures and ideas. So the next time you're online and see something cool (or weird), remember that it was created one bit at a time!

Why are there no 128-bit processors on the market?

There are many reasons why CPUs do not come in 128-bit varieties. The most obvious reason is that the benefits of a wider bus width would be outweighed by the increased cost and complexity of manufacturing such a chip. Additionally, there is no real demand for such a product in the market; 64-bit processors offer more than enough performance for most users. Finally, even if there were demand for 128-bit CPUs, current software would not be able to take advantage of their capabilities.

In closing, i want to remind you that today there are solutions beyond 64 bits, but they are not classic CPUs, but specialized components to perform specific activities and which work on particular data sets. In addition, there are logical solutions that allow you to work on 128-bit or higher data simply by exploiting modern architectures to create multi-bit virtual systems. This confirms that physical chips with over 64 bits are not really needed to meet modern technological challenges.

Ashique Billa Molla - Jun 19

All-time-devlopment - Jul 6

item.title: 为什么学习编码不应该那么难 | Why Learning to code shouldn't be that hard
item.description:
学习如何编码一直是许多计算机科学爱好者的目标。 人们想要学习如何编码的原因有很多，但最常见的原因是它被视为当今就业市场中的一项基本技能和资产。
因此，如果您想学习如何编码但没有经济能力，您应该如何“提高”您的技能？ 以下是有效学习编程语言所需的有用提示：

学习如何编码最流行的方法是给自己买一些书并在课程上花费数千美元。 但是，归根结底，您学习编码的最佳方式就是按照讲师在讲座中告诉您的内容。 很多人对这句话感到震惊，但这就是为什么它是正确的：你每天只需要一个小时来学习如何编码——即使你同时处理多个项目。 因此，您只需要每天一两个小时就可以开始您的编码生涯。 那你怎么处理这段时间？

好吧，对于初学者来说，您可能想学习如何在计算机上编码。 是的 - 即使您无法使用计算机或笔记本电脑，您也可以开始编码。 拿起一些书，在空闲时间阅读它们！

学习所有关于编程的知识对于你学习如何编码来说是一种非常糟糕的方式——尤其是如果你是一个完全的初学者。 那是因为如果你只专注于做这件事，那么你需要很长时间才能达到任何熟练程度。 相反，通过专注于解决问题来学习如何编码。
做到这一点的最好方法是参加一个有四个重点领域的课程：解决问题、批判性思维、编程和理解计算机系统及其语言。 这意味着您要在每个领域花费大量时间来查看每个领域的功能和局限性，以达到您的最终目标——成为编程语言专家。

学习如何编码对你来说不应该是一个可怕的经历——相反，它应该是一个令人兴奋的经历，你会带着美好的回忆回顾它，作为个人和个人成长的标志。
确保您在编码方面不会失去动力的最佳方法是开始将编程视为一种促进您已经拥有的兴趣的方式。 也许你真的很喜欢摄影，或者你对某个特定的事业有强烈的感情。 也许你甚至想设计游戏——无论哪种方式，确保你在努力改进的过程中保持你的热情不减退。

在工作世界中，大多数人忘记了对做某事的热情，而是专注于只做能赚钱的事情。 毕竟，这将改善您的财务状况并确保您能够过上舒适的生活。
因此，让自己走上成功的编程职业道路的最佳方式是密切关注自己喜欢做的​​工作。 一旦你找到了适合你的东西，就想办法让它在经济上也能发挥作用——即使这意味着兼职或打零工。 一旦你找到了一个适合你的生活并且在财务上有意义的目标，你将势不可挡！

很多人认为，只有在电脑前花费数小时才能学习如何编码。 然而，事实并非如此。 您实际上可以学习如何与他人一起编码。
编程是一种共享语言，一旦你开始学习，你会发现其他人会通过纠正你的错误甚至建议对你有用的解决方案来帮助你。 这意味着当人们问是否值得学习一门编程语言时，你的回答将是响亮的肯定！

学习如何编码听起来像是为了获得报酬而必须做的事情，因此您可能会觉得这根本不是一件令人愉快的事情。 这就是为什么让学习如何编码尽可能有趣很重要的原因。
因此，请确保在学习过程中始终牢记目标。 也许你想在接下来的六个月里尝试学习如何编码，或者你想在 12 个月后通过测试。 可能性是无穷无尽的——只要记住是什么让您的学习变得有趣，并在您尝试学习如何编码时牢记这一点！

一旦你致力于学习如何编码，有几件事可以帮助你尽快开始工作。 首先是在你的一天中创造一个时间，让你能够专注于学习。
对于生活中的其他事情，您需要制定时间表并知道何时能够找到学习时间。 通过写下你正在做的事情来计划你的一天，然后找出你认为可以安全地完成你议程上的所有事情的时间。 然后简单地从那些会让你失望的活动中删除任何东西，然后花一天时间学习如何编码！

在你的一生中，你会想要确保你继续学习。 否则，您将被视为过时的工人。 因此，您应该始终尝试通过在空闲时间继续学习来保持最新的编码知识。
幸运的是，您可以使用大量不同的资源来让自己了解编程语言和技术领域的最新动态。 例如，有很多书籍涵盖了最新技术以及网络研讨会和其他形式的关于学习如何编码的在线视频。

人们通常先了解自己擅长什么，然后再向其他方向发展。 例如，您可能擅长数学，因此您开始学习如何编写一个软件程序来帮助您快速解决数学问题。
然而，重要的是你要开始学习如何编码，首先做你喜欢的事情，然后慢慢地朝着那些看起来不那么有趣但作为未来发展起点的事情努力。 那是因为您的热情将使您的动力不致枯竭，并且进步将继续！

如果您想学习如何快速有效地编码，那么为自己设定短期目标很重要。 这样一来，您就可以享受一路上取得的进步，然后当事情不按您的意愿进行时，您就不会感到沮丧。
也许你会发现让自己保持在正轨上的有效方法之一是为自己制定短期目标，然后让自己知道，一旦你达到了这些目标，就该稍微改变一下了。 然后，一旦您的目标实现，就开始制定新的目标！

虽然您可能害怕开始学习如何编码，但重要的是不要让这阻止您开始学习。 毕竟，如果您不尝试任何事情，那么您将永远无法取得任何成就。
因此，让您快速学习如何编码的最佳方法是冒险尝试并给自己一个失败的机会。 不要害怕失败，因为那是您对成功充满热情并且没有界限的时候！

你会发现学习如何编码有时真的很令人沮丧，但它会过去的。 所以你不能让自己因为遇到问题而灰心，然后放弃它。

相反，要知道，您在此过程中遇到的每一点挫折都是一块垫脚石——它只是确保您不会气馁到完全放弃的地步。 因此，当事情不按您的意愿进行时，请继续努力，最终您会到达那里！

历久弥新—— 一旦被暂停，在暂停被解除之前，怜悯贝特将无法评论或发布帖子。

一旦解除暂停，merybett 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦未发布，所有由 merberbett 发布的帖子都将被隐藏，并且只有他们自己可以访问。

如果没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。



原文:

Learning how to code has been a goal for many computer science enthusiasts. There are many reasons why people want to learn how to code, but the most common reason is that it's seen as an essential skill and asset in today's job market.
So if you want to learn how to code but don't have the financial ability, how are you supposed to go about 'juicing up' your skills? Here are useful tips that you need in order to effectively learn a programming language:

1. Start Small - 1 Hour a Day

The most popular way to learn how to code is to get yourself some books and spend thousands of dollars on courses. However, when it comes down to it, the best way for you to learn how to code is just by following what the instructor tells you in their lectures. A lot of people are shocked by this statement, but here's why it's true: You only need one hour a day in order to learn how to code - even if you're working on multiple projects at once. So all you need is an hour or two a day in order to get going with your coding career. So what do you do with that time?

Well, for starters, you might want to learn how to code on a computer. Yes - you can get started with coding even if you don't have access to a computer or laptop. Grab some books and go through them in your free time!

2. Don't Study Programming - Study Problem-Solving

Learning everything about programming is a really bad way for you to go about learning how to code - especially if you're a total beginner. That's because it'll take too long for you to reach any level of proficiency if that's all you're concentrating on doing. Instead, learn how to code by focusing on problem-solving.
The best way to do this is by taking a course with four areas of focus: problem-solving, critical thinking, programming, and understanding computer systems and their language. This means that you spend a chunk of time on each area looking at the capabilities and limitations of each one in order to reach your ultimate goal - which is to become an expert in programming languages.

3. Discover Your Enthusiasm - Keep Yourself Motivated

Learning how to code shouldn't be a dreadful experience for you - instead it should be an exciting experience that you'll look back on with fond memories as a signifier of growth as both an individual and a person.
The best way to make sure that you don't lose your motivation when it comes to coding is to start looking at programming as a way for you to further an interest that you already have. Maybe you're really into photography, or maybe you have strong feelings about a particular cause. Maybe you even want to design games - either way, make sure that you keep your enthusiasm from fading as you work towards improving.

4. Look for Work That You Find Enjoyable - Not just Work That Pays

In the working world, most people forget about having a passion for doing something and instead focus on only working on things that pay good money. After all, that's what will improve your financial standing and ensure you're able to live comfortably.
So the best way to set yourself on the path to a successful career in programming is by keeping your eye out for work that you enjoy doing. Once you have found something that works for you, find a way to make it work financially as well - even if it means working part-time hours or odd hours. Once you've found a goal that fits into your life and makes sense financially, you'll be unstoppable!

5. Learn How To Code With Others - Not Alone

A lot of people believe that learning how to code will only be achieved when they spend hours in front of their computer alone. However, that's not the case. You can actually learn how to code with others.
Programming is a shared language and once you start learning, you'll find that other people are really helpful in helping you out either by correcting your mistakes or even suggesting solutions that work for you. This means that when people ask whether it's worth learning a programming language, your answer will be a resounding yes!

6. Make Learning How to Code Fun! - Don't Make It About Duty

Learning how to code sounds like something that you have to do in order to get paid and so you may feel like it's not something that's enjoyable at all. That's why it's important that you make learning how to code as fun as possible.
So make sure that you always have a goal in mind when it comes to your learning process. Perhaps you want to try and learn how to code over the next six months, or maybe you want to pass the test after 12 months. The possibilities are endless - just remember what makes your learning fun and keep that in mind when you go about trying to learn how to code!

7. Have A Plan for Learning - Create A Schedule

Once you've committed yourself to learning how to code, there are a few things that will help you get the ball rolling as quickly as possible. The first is to create a time in your day where you'll be able to concentrate on learning.
With everything else in your life, you need to create a schedule and know when you'll be able to find time for learning. Plan out your day by writing down what you have going on, and then figure out the time that you think it can safely take to do everything that's on your agenda. Then simply cut out anything from those activities that will bring you down and then spend my day learning how to code!

8. Never Stop Learning - Keep Your Knowledge Up-To-Date

Throughout your lifetime you'll want to make sure that you continue to learn. Otherwise, you'll be seen as an obsolete worker. So you should always try and keep your knowledge of coding up-to-date by continuing to learn on your free time.
Fortunately there are a bunch of different resources that you can use to keep yourself up-to-date with what's new in the world of programming languages and technology in general. For example, there are lots of books that cover the latest technology as well as webinars and other forms of online videos on learning how to code.

9. Make Sure You Learn What You Like - Not Just What You're Good At

People often learn what they're good at first and then branch out in other directions after that. For example, you might be good at math and so you start learning how to program a software program that will help you to solve problems in math quickly.
However, it's important for you to begin learning how to code by doing what you like first and then slowly working towards those things that may seem less interesting but are starting points for future growth. That's because your passion will keep your motivation from withering away and progress will continue!

10. Set Yourself Short Term Goals - Stay On Track

If you want to learn how to code quickly and efficiently, then it's important for you to set yourself short term goals. That way you can enjoy the progress that you make along the way and then keep yourself from getting frustrated when things just aren't going your way.
Perhaps one of the ways that you'll find effective in keeping yourself on track is by creating short term goals for yourself and then letting yourself know that once you've reached those goals, it'll be time to change them up a bit. Then once your goals are met, start making new ones!

11. Don't Be Afraid to Fail - To Win, You've Got to Lose

While you may be scared to start learning how to code, it's important for you not to let this deter you from getting started. After all, if you don't try anything then you're never going to achieve anything.
Therefore the best way for you to learn how to code quickly is by taking the plunge and giving yourself a chance at failure. Don't be afraid of failing because that's when your passion for success comes in and there are no boundaries!

12. Be Prepared For Frustration - Know That It Will Pass

You'll find learning how to code can be really frustrating sometimes but it'll pass. So you can't let yourself get discouraged by the fact that you're having trouble with something and then give up on it.

Instead, know that every little bit of frustration that you experience along the way is a stepping stone - it's just making sure that you don't become discouraged to the point where you give up altogether. So when things don't go your way, just keep pushing through and eventually you'll get there!
